summary: Complete testing of Folha de Horas PDF generation feature. All requirements verified: PDF sections per technician, technician name in header, no Técnico column, legend with totals by code/type, price table selection, and tariff auto-fill based on código horário.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - accessibility improvement suggested

seed_data_creation: Used existing OT #356 with 4 technicians (Miguel Moreira, Pedro Duarte, Gichelson Leite, Nuno Santos)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Folha de Horas PDF generation fully functional. OT #356 (ID: 8d3a0111-8f03-45d5-a7eb-2cbfcc96ad85) used for testing with 4 technicians. 5 price tables available (2024, 2025, Kannegiesser, Tabela Urgente, Com Contrato). Navigate to /technical-reports, click Ordens de Trabalho tab, click on OT card to open details, then click 'Folha de Horas' button (data-testid='folha-horas-btn').

POST /api/relatorios-tecnicos/{id}/folha.details: Returns valid PDF (200, application/pdf), PDF starts with %PDF magic bytes, Content-Disposition contains 'FolhaHoras'

PDF sections separated by technician.details: Code verified: PageBreak added between technicians (line 301), each technician gets own section

No Técnico column in table.details: Code verified: Table headers do not include 'Técnico' column (lines 338-355)

Legend with totals by code and type.details: Code verified: 'RESUMO DE HORAS POR CÓDIGO E TIPO' section with format 'Código X – Tipo: HH:MM total' (lines 561-590)

FolhaHorasModal - Price table selection.details: Modal shows 5 price tables (2024, 2025, Kannegiesser, Tabela Urgente, Com Contrato) with €/km values

Tariff auto-fill based on código horário.details: Tarifas por Técnico section shows auto-filled dropdowns like 'Tarifa Diurna (30.00€/h)', 'Viagem Diurna (25.00€/h)'

api_tests_summary.GET /api/tabelas-preco: PASS - Returns 5 price tables with valor_km
api_tests_summary.GET /api/relatorios-tecnicos/{id}/folha-: PASS - Returns technicians, registos, cliente data
api_tests_summary.POST /api/relatorios-tecnicos/{id}/folha: PASS - Works with different table_id values
